content: To maximize the effectiveness of cheat meals, always include protein, as it helps satiate you and prevents overindulgence on carbs.
Eating protein with cheat meals helps keep you full and utilizes the body's insulin response to enhance nutrient absorption of beneficial compounds.
Before a cheat meal, drinking lemon water for 15 minutes can aid in digestion and improve nutrient absorption, reducing abdominal distress.
During cheat meals, sitting down and eating slowly enhances enjoyment and allows the body to signal fullness, preventing overeating.
Cheat meals should be oriented around workouts, particularly full-body resistance training, to maximize muscle growth and recovery.
